headline: 3 Reasons MNST Has Explosive Upside Potential
summary: Over the past six months, Monster has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 11.2%. Its stock price has climbed to $93.03, representing a healthy 19.8% increase. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
